_doc: Payload registry for gold-conflict ruling cards: card id → which gold entries are disputed. Written when the conflict card is staged; read by apply_rulings.py when Mohamed rules. Without this file the ruling has no machine-readable target (the June 13 lesson: his drop_conflicted tap sat unconsumed for 2h because the keys lived only in a chat transcript).

gold_conflicts_0613.why: 3× worn formulas (لحظة/يجمعنا) he banned + 1× فلافل product he himself questioned («does albaik have falafel?»)
